\label{main thm}
    Let $E$ be an elliptic curve over $\mathbb{Q}$ with good ordinary reduction at $p$ such that $E[p]$ is reducible. Assume that the Conjecture \ref{main conjecture} is true for all elliptic curves over $\mathbb{Q}$ that are isogenous to $E$. Moreover, the isogeny $E\rightarrow E'$ has degree $p^{\mu_p(E)}$.
